# FAB Chain Template

```
FEATURE  : <what the solution is — capability / tech / process>
ADVANTAGE: <what the feature does better than alternatives>
BENEFIT  : <what the advantage means to the customer, in customer language>
PRIORITY_ID: customer_priority:<name>   ← MUST exist as an entity in the workspace
PROOF    : <past_performance_reference / compliance_artifact / metric>
```

Reject if Benefit is the Feature restated, or if `PRIORITY_ID` does not resolve to a workspace entity.
